source.title: SunSafe Travel Insurance — Product Disclosure Statement (synthetic)

sections.text: SunSafe Travel Insurance PDS. This document sets out what is and is not covered.
Travel delay: if your scheduled departure is delayed by more than 6 hours due to a covered event, you may claim up to $200 per day to a maximum of $1,000.
Trip cancellation: we will reimburse non-refundable prepaid travel costs if you cancel for a covered reason, up to $10,000 per person.
Exclusions: claims arising from changes of mind, strike action known before booking, or financial collapse of a carrier are not covered.

ai_output: If your flight is delayed, SunSafe covers up to $200 per day with no cap on the number of days. Trip cancellation is covered up to $10,000 per person for non-refundable costs. Strike action is always covered, regardless of when it was announced. The policy covers all travel delays, even those caused by the airline's own mechanical failures.

claims.text: If your flight is delayed, SunSafe covers up to $200 per day with no cap on the number of days.
claims.label: partial
claims.quote: up to $200 per day to a maximum of $1,000
claims.rationale: The $200/day rate is correct, but the claim omits the $1,000 total cap — implying unlimited daily cover.

claims.text: Trip cancellation is covered up to $10,000 per person for non-refundable costs.
claims.label: grounded
claims.rationale: Section s5_2 states exactly this limit for non-refundable prepaid costs.

claims.text: Strike action is always covered, regardless of when it was announced.
claims.label: unsupported
claims.rationale: Section s9 explicitly excludes strike action known before booking. The claim is the opposite of the policy.

claims.text: The policy covers all travel delays, even those caused by the airline's own mechanical failures.
claims.label: grounded
claims.quote: delayed by more than 6 hours due to a covered event
claims.rationale: Mechanical failure is a covered event; the 6-hour threshold and daily cap apply but the type of cause is not excluded.

scorecard.domain_note: benchmark distribution; NOT measured on PDS
